title: ShearableBlazes
description: A Fabric mod that allows players to shear and milk Blazes.
body:
# Shearable Blazes Allows players to shear and milk Blazes.
Shearing a Blaze will give you 1-3 Blaze Rods, and using a Bucket on a Blaze will give you a Lava Bucket.
Sheared Blazes will not drop Blaze Rods when killed.
